module.name: flow
module.description: A vertical flowchart of steps and decisions connected by arrows. Body = one node per section; a section ending in "?" becomes a diamond decision.
module.aiSpec:
A simple VERTICAL FLOWCHART — a top-to-bottom sequence of boxes joined by down arrows, where a step phrased as a question (ending in "?") is drawn as a DECISION diamond.
Body: split the sections with `<!-- @ -->`, one node per section (Markdown allowed). - A section whose text ends in "?" renders as a decision diamond. - To label an edge (a decision branch), start the NEXT section with a bracketed label, e.g. `[Yes] Deploy` — "Yes" labels the arrow, "Deploy" is the node text. Keep it to one main path; use @mermaid for graphs with real branching/merging.
Parameters: - `color` : node border, arrow and edge-label accent. Default var(--accent-color). - `align` : left | center | right — horizontal placement of the column. Default center. - `shape` : rounded | square — corner style of the step boxes. Default rounded. - `numbered` : true/false — auto-number the step boxes (decisions are not numbered). Default false. - `maxwidth` : max node width as a percent of the column. Default 80. Range 20–100.
<!-- @flow color: #2e86de, numbered: true --> Receive request <!-- @ --> Valid? <!-- @ --> [Yes] Process it <!-- @ --> Send response <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Node border, arrow and edge-label accent color.

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Horizontal placement of the flow column.

param.name: shape
param.label: Box shape
param.desc: Corner style of the step boxes.

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max node width (%)
param.desc: Maximum node width as a percent of the column.

snippet.label: Flowchart (vertical)
snippet.description: Top-down steps joined by arrows; a "?" section becomes a decision diamond; [Yes]/[No] labels an edge.
